title: Supply Chain Manager - Smartr Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Smartr Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Smartr Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Smartr Logistics:
Smartr Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartr Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
